time_range.description: Optional start and end date time for the report window. Defaults to the most recent 7 days when omitted.

x-twilio.shortDescription: Start time of the report
Start time of the report

account_sid.description: The unique SID identifier of the Account.

report_id.description: The report identifier as Voice Insights Report TTID.

account_sid.description: The unique SID identifier of the Account.

report_id.description: The account level report identifier as Voice Insights Report TTID.

x-twilio.shortDescription: Start time of the report
Start time of the report

size.description: The number of max available top Phone Numbers to generate.

handle.description: Inbound phone number handle represented in the report.

total_calls.description: Total number of calls made with the given handle during the report period.

call_answer_score.description:
The call answer score measures customers behavior to the delivered calls.
The score is a value between 0 and 100, where 100 indicates that all calls were successfully answered.

call_state_percentage.description: Percentage of calls made in each state.

silent_calls_percentage.description: Percentage of inbound calls with silence tags over total outbound calls. A silent tag is indicative of a connectivity issue or muted audio.

total_calls.description: Total number of outbound calls made with the given handle during the report period.

call_answer_score.description:
The call answer score measures customers behavior to the delivered calls.
The score is a value between 0 and 100, where 100 indicates that all calls were successfully answered.

calls_by_device_type.description:
Number of calls made with each device type.
`voip`, `mobile`, `landline`, `unknown`

answer_rate_device_type.description:
Answer rate for each device type.
`voip`, `mobile`, `landline`, `unknown`

call_state_percentage.description: Percentage of calls made in each state.

blocked_calls_by_carrier.description: Percentage of blocked calls by carrier per country.

silent_calls_percentage.description: Percentage of calls with silence tags over total calls. A silent tag is indicative of a connectivity issue or muted audio.

short_duration_calls_percentage.description: Percentage of completed outbound calls under 10 seconds (PSTN Short call tags); More than 15% is typically low trust measured.

long_duration_calls_percentage.description: Percentage of long duration calls ( >= 60 seconds)

potential_robocalls_percentage.description: Percentage of completed outbound calls to unassigned or unallocated phone numbers.

total_calls.description: Total number of calls with answering machine detection (AMD) enabled.

x-twilio.shortDescription: Total number of calls with answering machine detection enabled

answered_by_human_percentage.description: Percentage of calls marked as answered by human.

x-twilio.shortDescription: Percentage of calls marked as answered by human

answered_by_machine_percentage.description:
Percentage of calls marked as answered by machined related like the following:
`machine_start`, `machine_end_beep`, `machine_end_silence`, `machine_end_other`, `fax`

answering_machine_detection.description: Number of calls made in answering machine detection (AMD) enabled.

values.description: List of supported filter values for the field name
List of supported filter values for the field name

filters.description: Filter values applied to the report

call_deliverability_score.description:
The call deliverability score measures the network effectiveness in delivering calls by scoring calls reach the intended recipient.
The score is a value between 0 and 100, where 100 indicates that all calls were successfully delivered.

call_answer_score.description:
The call answer score measures customers behavior to the delivered calls.
The score is a value between 0 and 100, where 100 indicates that all calls were successfully answered.

total_calls.description: Total number of calls made during the report period.

call_direction.description: Number of calls made in each direction.

call_state.description: Number of calls made in each state.

call_type.description:
Number of calls made in each type.
`carrier`, `sip`, `trunking`, `client`, `whatsapp`

aloc.description: Average length of call in seconds.

twilio_edge_location.description: Number of calls made in each Twilio Edge location. Refer to [Public Edge Locations](https://www.twilio.com/docs/global-infrastructure/edge-locations#public-edge-locations) for more detail.

caller_country_code.description: Number of calls originating from each country (ISO alpha-2).

callee_country_code.description: Number of calls terminating in each country (ISO alpha-2).

network_issues.description: Network-quality indicators for SDK and Twilio Gateway traffic during the report period.

ice_failures_percentage.description: Percentage of ICE connection failure tag that ICE candidates have failed to find compatible connection.

Percentage of calls marked as answered by machined related like the following:

by_use_case.description: Details of branded calls by use case.

info.title: Sample/reference Twilio API.
info.description: This is the reference API for the rest-proxy server.

/v2/Voice/Reports.description: Root resource for Voice Reports V2

post.description: Create a Report for a specific account with given time range and filters.

Access-Control-Allow-Origin.description: Specify the origin(s) allowed to access the resource

Access-Control-Allow-Methods.description: Specify the HTTP methods allowed when accessing the resource

Access-Control-Allow-Headers.description: Specify the headers allowed when accessing the resource

Access-Control-Allow-Credentials.description: Indicates whether the browser should include credentials

get.description: Get Account Level Report for the given Report Id.

Access-Control-Allow-Origin.description: Specify the origin(s) allowed to access the resource

Access-Control-Allow-Methods.description: Specify the HTTP methods allowed when accessing the resource

Access-Control-Allow-Headers.description: Specify the headers allowed when accessing the resource

Access-Control-Allow-Credentials.description: Indicates whether the browser should include credentials

get.summary: Fetch Voice Insights Account Level Report

Access-Control-Allow-Origin.description: Specify the origin(s) allowed to access the resource

Access-Control-Allow-Methods.description: Specify the HTTP methods allowed when accessing the resource

Access-Control-Allow-Headers.description: Specify the headers allowed when accessing the resource

Access-Control-Allow-Credentials.description: Indicates whether the browser should include credentials

post.summary: Create Inbound Phone Numbers Level Report

get.description: Get Inbound Phone Numbers Level Reports for the given Report Id.

parameters.name: PageSize
parameters.description: How many resources to return in each list page.

parameters.name: Page
parameters.description: The page index. This value is simply for client state.

parameters.name: PageToken
parameters.description: The page token. This is provided by the API.

Access-Control-Allow-Origin.description: Specify the origin(s) allowed to access the resource

Access-Control-Allow-Methods.description: Specify the HTTP methods allowed when accessing the resource

Access-Control-Allow-Headers.description: Specify the headers allowed when accessing the resource

Access-Control-Allow-Credentials.description: Indicates whether the browser should include credentials
